title: AI Policy Manifest
description: Schema for ai-policy.json v1.0: machine-readable AI agent permissions for websites.

version.description: The version of the ai-policy.json specification this file conforms to. This schema validates v1.x files, where x is any non-negative integer representing a minor version. Major version changes require a new schema.

domain.description: The fully qualified domain name this policy applies to, without protocol prefix or path. Validation here is a basic sanity check; agents SHOULD apply full RFC 1035 validation as needed.

schema.description: URL pointing to the JSON Schema definition for validation.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date and time this policy was last created or modified.

site_type.description: Tags describing the type of website. Informational, not prescriptive. Values MUST be either from the closed vocabulary below or follow the 'x-' extension pattern for custom types.

description.description: Plain-language summary of the policy. Informational only. MUST NOT be relied upon for compliance determination.

training.description: Whether AI model providers may use this domain's content as training data.

search.description: Whether AI search engines may index and reference this domain's content.

ai_input.description: Whether AI systems may use this domain's content as input at inference time for real-time response generation.

bots.description: Explicit lists of bot user-agent names that are blocked or allowed.

blocked.description: Bot user-agent names that SHOULD NOT access this domain.

allowed.description: Bot user-agent names that MAY access this domain, subject to the permissions object.

contact.description: Email address for AI-related policy inquiries.

policy_url.description: URL to a human-readable policy page.

generated_by.description: Informational. Identifies the tool or service that generated this file.

capabilities.description: Reserved for future versions. V1 processors MUST ignore this field. Type constraints will be defined in the future version that introduces this field.

^x-[a-z0-9-]+$.description: Extension field for vendor-specific or experimental use. Agents MUST ignore fields they do not recognize.
